name: Marshmallow Bumpies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the softened cream cheese and milk. Add the confectioner's sugar and vanilla, mixing well. Set aside.
2. Melt the baking chocolate over hot water, stirring until smooth.
3. Combine the cream cheese mixture, melted chocolate, and salt, mixing thoroughly. Fold in the miniature marshmallows.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls into the coconut, completely coating each candy. Place on a greased cookie sheet. Chill in the refrigerator until firm.
